thread: Did Jandice Barov get clear of Scholomance, and what damage can she still do at large?

evidence.clue: Sylvanas binds Jandice in the upper levels before going below.
On the climb out the cabinet stands open and the curtain cord lies cut on the floor.
Sylvanas leaves Jandice bound in the upper levels after forcing the lower route out of her.
On the ascent the cabinet stands open and the curtain cord lies cut on the floor, confirming Jandice escaped while attention was on the sanctum below.
Chapter 14 confirms Jandice curated Jaina's route through Scholomance, which means her control over what Jaina saw remains part of the fallout even after her physical escape.

readerKnows: Jandice remains loose, and chapter 14 adds a sharper reason to care: she did not merely escape the building, she helped shape the false partial picture Jaina carried out of it.
povCharacterKnows: Jaina now knows more clearly how much Jandice sanitized her path. Sylvanas knows Jandice is loose and that the upper-level guide helped hide the stock work from Jaina.
notes: Still open after chapter 14. The thread now carries both physical escape risk and narrative-control fallout from Jandice's curated route.
